name: Cron.Decoder
comment:
This module contains the function to turn a Crontab `String` into `CronSchedule`
@docs decodeCronTab

values.name: decodeCronTab
values.comment:
Function to decode the standard CronTab.

        decodeCronTab "* * * * *" =
        Just (
        CronSchedule
          ([CronField Star Nothing])
          ([CronField Star Nothing])
          ([CronField Star Nothing])
          ([CronField Star Nothing])
          ([CronField Star Nothing])
        )

        decodeCronTab "12-27/3 * * JAN MON-FRI" =
        Just (
        CronSchedule
          ([CronField (RangeField 12 27) (Just 3)])
          ([CronField Star Nothing])
          ([CronField Star Nothing])
          ([CronField (SpecificField 1) Nothing])
          ([CronField (RangeField 1 5) Nothing])
        )

        decodeCronTab "12-27/3 * JAN MON-FRI *" =
        Nothing -- Invalid syntax

name: Cron.Describe
comment:
This module contains the functions to describe the `CronSchedule`

@docs describeSchedule, scheduleDescription

values.name: describeSchedule
values.comment:
A function that puts a `CronSchedule` into a more-or-less readable format.

        Maybe.map describeSchedule <| decodeCronTab "* * * * *" =
        Just {
        minuteDescription = "every minute"
      , hourDescription = "every hour"
      , dayDescription = "every day"
      , monthDescription = "every month"
      , dayOfWeekDescription = "every day of the week"
     }

        Maybe.map describeSchedule <| decodeCronTab "12-27/3 * * JAN MON-FRI" =
        Just {
        minuteDescription = "every 3 minute between 12 and 27"
      , hourDescription = "every hour"
      , dayDescription = "every day"
      , monthDescription = "at month 1"
      , dayOfWeekDescription = "every day of the week between 1 and 5" }

        Maybe.map describeSchedule <| decodeCronTab "12-27/3 * JAN MON-FRI *" =
        Nothing -- Invalid syntax

values.name: scheduleDescription
values.comment:
A function that puts a `CronSchedule` into a more-or-less readable format.

        Maybe.map scheduleDescription <| decodeCronTab "* * * * *" =
        Just "every minute; every hour; every day; every month; every day of the week"
     }

        Maybe.map scheduleDescription <| decodeCronTab "12-27/3 * * JAN MON-FRI" =
        Just "every 3 minute between 12 and 27; every hour; every day; at month 1; every day of the week between 1 and 5"

        Maybe.map scheduleDescription <| decodeCronTab "12-27/3 * JAN MON-FRI *" =
        Nothing -- Invalid syntax

name: Cron.Types
comment:
This module contains the types used in parsing cron expressions.

@docs BaseField, CronField, CronSchedule, DescribedCronSchedule

unions.name: BaseField
unions.comment:
Basic unit of Crontab. It can be one of the following three cases:

  - `Star` corresponds to `*`
  - `SpecificField n` describes a specific value given by an integer `n`
  - `RangeField m n` describes the range `m`-`n` with `m`<`n`

unions.name: CronField
unions.comment:
`CronField` includes the `BaseField` and a possible step. For example, a field `*/12`
will be rendered as

    sF : CronField

    sf =
        CronField Star (Just 12)

unions.name: CronSchedule
unions.comment:
`CronSchedule` contains the `CronField`'s for the five parameters:

    cS : CronSchedule
    cS =
        CronSchedule minutes hours days months day_of_week

aliases.name: DescribedCronSchedule
aliases.comment: A record containing readable descriptions for the Crontab fields.
aliases.type: { minuteDescription : String, hourDescription : String, dayDescription : String, monthDescription : String, dayOfWeekDescription : String }
